breakdown: This PR fixes a bug where rewards_box payloads were passed through without normalization. LLM-generated responses may use non-standard keys like 'xp' instead of 'xp_gained'. The fix adds a call to normalize_rewards_box_for_ui in the passthrough path, updates that function to handle fallback keys, and adds a test verifying the normalization works correctly. Overall solid code quality with good test coverage.
key_changes: Added normalize_rewards_box_for_ui call in _resolve_canonical_level_up_ui_pair to normalize rewards before persistence
Extended normalize_rewards_box_for_ui to check 'xp'/'gold_pieces' as fallbacks when 'xp_gained'/'gold' are missing
Added .pop() calls to remove raw fallback keys after normalization
Created new test file test_streaming_passthrough_normalization.py with E2E test using real LLM to verify the fix
